---
title: "Contact Me"
comments: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: assets/contact.css
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}

If you are interested in data analytics consultation, data analysis services, or personalized training, please reach out to me here and I will get back to you as soon as possible. I look forward to hearing from you!

<br>

<div class="social-icons">

<a href="https://github.com/MatosFlavio" target="_blank">
{{< fa brands github size=2x >}}
</a>

<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/flavio-matos/" target="_blank">
{{< fa brands linkedin size=2x >}}
</a>

<a href="mailto:flavio.matos@faktaconsulting.com">
{{< fa solid envelope size=2x >}}
</a>

</div>

:::

::: {.column width="10%"}

:::


::: {.column width="45%"}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/yourID" method="POST">

<label>Your Name</label>
<input type="text" name="name" required>

<label>Email</label>
<input type="email" name="email" required>

<label>Message</label>
<textarea name="message" rows="4" required></textarea>

<button type="submit">Submit</button>

</form>

:::

::::
